title: Portable bubble injection system
abstract: Embodiments of portable bubble injection systems are described. In an embodiment, an apparatus for injecting air bubbles into a portable tub (102) may include an air inlet configured to receive air from an external air source. The apparatus may also include a one-way valve (204) coupled to the air inlet, the one-way valve configured to allow air to flow into the air inlet and to prevent backflow through the inlet. The apparatus may further include an airflow channel (202) coupled to the inlet, the airflow configured to extend into the portable tub, the airflow channel comprising a plurality of openings (304) configured to release air into the portable tub.
claims: Claims Claims 1. An apparatus for injecting air bubbles into a portable tub, comprising: an air inlet configured to receive air from an external air source; a backflow prevention mechanism configured to allow air to flow into the air inlet and to prevent backflow through the inlet; and an airflow channel coupled to the inlet, the airflow configured to extend into the portable tub, the airflow channel comprising a plurality of openings configured to release air into the portable tub. 2. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the air inlet comprises a coupler configured to receive a connector coupled to the external air source. 3. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the airflow channel further comprises a first portion configured to extend from the air inlet through a sidewall of the portable tub. 4. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the airflow channel further comprises a bubble jet channel, the bubble jet channel comprising the plurality of holes. 5. The apparatus of claim 4, wherein the bubble jet channel is configured to be disposed on a bottom portion of the portable tub. 6. The apparatus of claim 4, wherein the bubble jet channel is configured to be disposed along an interior surface of the a sidewall of the portable tub. 7. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the plurality of openings each comprise a hole having a predetermined diameter, the diameter sized to produce bubbles of a predetermined size. 8. The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the plurality of openings each comprise a slot having a predetermined width and length, the width and length sized to produce bubbles of a predetermined size. 9. A system for injecting air bubbles into a portable tub, comprising: an portable tub configured to contain water; an air pump configured to create a flow of air; and an air bubble injection device coupled to the portable tub, the air bubble injection device comprising: an air inlet configured to receive air from the air pump; a backflow prevention mechanism configured to allow air to flow into the air inlet and to prevent backflow through the inlet; and an airflow channel coupled to the inlet, the airflow channel configured to extend into the portable tub, the airflow channel comprising a plurality of holes configured to release air into the portable tub. 10. The system of claim 9, wherein the air inlet comprises a coupler configured to receive a connector coupled to the external air source. 11. The system of claim 9, wherein the airflow channel further comprises a first portion configured to extend from the air inlet through a sidewall of the portable tub. 12. The system of claim 9, wherein the airflow channel further comprises a bubble jet channel, the bubble jet channel comprising the plurality of holes. 13. The system of claim 12, wherein the bubble jet channel is configured to be disposed on a bottom portion of the portable tub. 14. The system of claim 12, wherein the bubble jet channel is configured to be disposed along an interior surface of the a sidewall of the portable tub. 15. The system of claim 9, wherein the plurality of openings each comprise a hole having a predetermined diameter, the diameter sized to produce bubbles of a predetermined size. 16. The system of claim 9, wherein the plurality of openings each comprise a slot having a predetermined width and length, the width and length sized to produce bubbles of a predetermined size. 17. The system of claim 9, wherein the portable tub further comprises inflatable an inflatable sidewall. 18. The system of claim 17, wherein the inflatable sidewall further comprises a plurality of inflatable rings. 19. The system of claim 9, further comprising an air conduit coupling the air pump to the portable tub. 20. The system of claim 9, wherein the portable tub further comprises a drain configured to drain water from the portable tub.
